title: add registry information to varlink info
body:
when using the varlink api, we should pass on the registries information
as is present in the cli info command.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit 6f47eb0 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 6f47eb0b287f35ebfb42fb44f0228b24dfee0d1e -->
Travis failure is the registry search failure, which is fixed. Manually merging.
